title: The quality debt is real
subtitle: Shifts in US code-quality metrics from 2023 to 2025, covering the two years AI coding assistants went mainstream.
caption: Source: GitClear 2025 'AI Assistant Code Quality Research', analysis of millions of pull requests across engineering teams with varying AI-assistant adoption. Copy-paste now exceeds refactoring for the first time on record; bugs-per-developer rose sharply on teams with heaviest AI usage.

left.label: Code clones
left.description: growth in duplicated code across repos. More adequate output, more surface area, more places for the same bug to hide.

right.label: Bugs per developer
right.description: on teams with heaviest AI adoption. Every one of those bugs is work for the humans who can triage, rewrite, and delete — i.e. the leverage and judgment doors.
